"[63] [Appended, 06:03:05] [3] [05:55:23 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363 has entered the chat[05:55:23 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 12:55PM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 38.6549 (N), Longitude -122.5983 (W).[05:55:23 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[05:55:23 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 642 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +17075330363.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.[05:55:52 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim has entered the chat[05:55:52 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: 911 EMERGENCY WHAT ARE YOU REPORTING?[05:55:59 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: WHATS THE LOCATION OF THE CRASH?[05:56:43 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: There's been a motorcycle crash [05:56:54 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: WHAT IS THE LOCATION PLEASE?[05:57:22 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: St Helena mt [05:57:37 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: DO YOU KNOW THE NEAREST CROSS STREET?[05:58:10 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: No sorry[05:58:18 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: IS THIS NEAR LAWLEY TOLL[05:58:49 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: HOW MANY VEHICLES ARE INVOLVED IN THE CRASH?[05:59:37 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] (707) 533-0363: Near Robertson Stevenson park someone told me. 2 bikes [05:59:53 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: OK MAY I HAVE YOUR NAME AND PHONE NUMBER FOR OUR LOG[06:00:42 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: ARE YOU INVOLDED IN THE CRASH OR PASSERBY?[06:01:34 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: HELLO ARE YOU THERE?[06:02:37 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026] Melissa Yim: NEG RESPONSE CHP DISCONNECTING Call initiated: 05:55:23 GMT-07:00 04 Jun 2026Phone number: (707) 533-0363"
